markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.162 — Motor Number Required for Registration; Penalty

A person commits an offense if the person violates Section 501.0331 (Motor Number Required for Registration) . An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $50 and not more than $100.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 69, eff. January 1, 2012.*
